title: Allay Overhaul
description: This mod adds 9 new Allay colors, 9 unique hats, and the ability to store Allays in a custom bottle.
body:
# Allay Overhaul Mod
A comprehensive Minecraft mod that enhances the Allay entity with customization options and new features.
![image with 9 different colored allays](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a0a6659906eee96fe632d042d4fc7beafb35508.jpeg)

## Recipe
See Gallery

## Features
### How to transform Allay color 
- Give it a colored shard.
- Throw a regeneration potion on the Allay.
### Colored Allays
Transform your Allay into 9 different vibrant colors using special shards. Each colored Allay provides unique status effects to nearby players when holding a Nether Star:

- Red - Health Boost
- Blue - Water Breathing
- Green - Regeneration
- Yellow - Speed
- Purple - Slow Falling
- Orange - Fire Resistance
- Pink - Jump Boost
- Black - Night Vision
- White - Resistance

### Allay Bottle
Capture and transport your Allay using a custom bottle item. The bottle preserves:
- The Allay's color
- Custom name
- Held items
- Equipped hat

Simply use the bottle on an Allay to store it, then place it back in the world whenever you need.
Allay Hats
Dress up your Allay with 9 adorable hat options! Equip hats by right-clicking the Allay with a hat item, and remove them by sneaking and right-clicking with an empty hand. Hats are preserved when storing the Allay in a bottle and will drop upon the Allay's death.
